title: War of the Worlds
posterAlt: War of the Worlds (2025) movie poster
tmdbOverview: Will Radford is a top analyst for Homeland Security who tracks potential threats through a mass surveillance program, until one day an attack by an unknown entity leads him to question whether the government is hiding something from him... and from the rest of the world.
synopsis: War of the Worlds (2025) is a science fiction and thriller film from United States. It has a 2.5 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a PG-13 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
